concerns.text: FR-008 requires classifying dominant intermolecular interaction types using geometric criteria (H-bond distance < 3.5Å, angle > 150°). The plan.md 'Methodology' section (Step 6) mentions this classification but lacks a concrete implementation task or script phase to execute it. The plan focuses on regression (packing coefficient) but does not explicitly schedule the classification logic, risking the SC-003/US-3 acceptance criteria being unmet.

FR-007 mandates handling missing data: imputing auxiliary descriptors with median and excluding missing targets. The plan.md 'Methodology' section (Step 1) mentions filtering but does not explicitly describe the imputation logic or the logging of excluded rows as required by the spec. This gap may lead to silent data loss or incorrect imputation.

SC-005 requires multiple-comparison correction (Bonferroni or FDR) when comparing models. The plan.md 'Methodology' (Step 4) mentions 'Bonferroni correction' in the text, but the 'Evaluation & Statistical Rigor' section in research.md is the primary source of this detail. The plan.md itself should explicitly state that the evaluation script (03_evaluate_and_report.py) will implement this correction to ensure the task is actionable.
